Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and teaches technical skills in programming for employment and entrepreneurship (Target 4.4).

Emphasizes basic principles and concepts of object-oriented programming using JAVA

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course equips students with skills in 'Profession of information technology', supporting technological upgrading and innovation for productive employment (Target 8.2).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course is fundamental to building technological capabilities and innovation (Target 9.5) by teaching students to 'develop and manage Java software projects'.

develop and manage Java software projects
